summary: A Go-based modular testing framework with plugin support that detects conditions, runs assertions, and generates reports, currently focused on expanding its v0.3 assertion capabilities.
concerns: heavy reliance on test files for key insights suggests implementation may still be evolving
untracked file in git status indicates possible incomplete commit hygiene
scattered config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, GOrchestra) suggest configuration sprawl
suggestions: consolidate configuration into a single standard location
ensure all new files are properly tracked and committed
focus on completing v0.3 assertion pack roadmap items
add integration tests for the Kubernetes examples
